description: Front-A conformance ledger for the design-knowledge intake program (backlog #1585 / #1586), mirroring the platform-standards watch's #1267 ledger. One row per ADMITTED authoritative design-knowledge source, tracking whether that source has yet been DISTILLED into the codified #1034 design-critique rubric (provenance carried per axis, #1587). The metric the gate surfaces is the count of rows where `distilledInto` is empty — curated sources whose priors are not yet reflected in the rubric. The watch program maintains this ledger: each distillation item flips a row's `distilledInto` to the rubric axis/version it landed in; each source-discovery run adds a row when a new authoritative source is admitted. `credibilityWeight` is PROVISIONAL equal weight pending the #1588 admission/credibility-weight decision — durable peer-reviewed usability research should ultimately outrank a trend blog, but the weighting criteria are an open fork, so every seed row carries the same placeholder weight for now. This is a curated tracking ledger, not a derived view — keep it honest at close-out of each watch item.
credibilityWeightScale: provisional: all seed rows weighted 1.0 pending #1588; the decision will replace this with a kind-aware scale (peer-reviewed > standard > guideline > book > blog)

entries.source: Nielsen Norman Group — 10 Usability Heuristics for User Interface Design
